text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text: Hm? Trainer, are you feeling a little tired?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Lemme share some of these
rejuvenation items I have.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Aroma oil... herbal tea... and bath bombs... Hehe,
I know, I've got all sorts of good stuff. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
It's important to have little daily relaxation! Work
and studying can really take it out of you, after
all.
